definitions: A fixed regular payment, typically paid on a monthly or biweekly basis but often expressed as an annual amount, made by an employer to an employee, especially a professional or white-collar worker, for services rendered.
The total amount of money an employee receives for their work over a period of time.
examples: His annual salary is quite generous.
The company offers a competitive salary package.
She lives comfortably on her salary.
Many factors influence the salary range for a position.
